title: RoboCata Robot Record
description: A robot record conformant with RoboCata Standard V1.0 (March 2026).

_canonical_version.description: RoboCata Standard version this record conforms to

type.description: Physical form factor classification (e.g., "Robotic Arm", "Mobile Platform")

domain.description: Application domain â€” PRO (Professional & Services), HOME (Home & Consumer), IND (Industrial & Manufacturing)

info_model.description: Model designation, if different from the product name

info_model_number.description: Alphanumeric model number for the specific variant

info_id.description: Manufacturerâ€™s unique product identifier or SKU

description_detailed.description: Full description covering capabilities, applications, features (80â€“200 words)

description_long.description: Extended narrative description (2â€“5 sentences) for SEO and detail pages

current_version.description: Current software or hardware version number

product_url.description: Link to the manufacturerâ€™s official product page

github_url.description: Link to open-source repository if available

github_repos.description: Number of GitHub repositories related to this robot

meta_tags.description: Keywords and tags for search optimization

info_status.description: Availability status (e.g. In Production, Pre-order, Coming Soon, Prototype).

info_release_year.description: Year the robot was first released or announced

info_status_since_date.description: Date when the status became effective

media_primaryimage.description: URL of the primary product image (used for thumbnails, OG tags, listings)

images.description: Array of image URLs for the robot gallery

media_video_url.description: Primary product video (YouTube/Vimeo link or MP4)

media_demovideo_url.description: Demonstration video showing the robot in operation

media_brochure_url.description: Link to marketing brochure PDF. Documents should be provided in PDF format unless otherwise specified.

media_datasheet_url.description: Link to technical datasheet PDF. Documents should be provided in PDF format unless otherwise specified.

material_construction.description: Primary construction material (aluminum, steel, carbon fiber)

tech_maxspeedvalue.description: Maximum speed as raw numeric value

speed_mobile_ms.description: Maximum movement speed in meters per second

tech_speedunit.description: Unit for speed measurement (m/s, mm/s, cm/s, RPM)

joint_speeds.description: Individual joint rotation speeds (Â°/s per axis)

dynamic_model.description: Available dynamic model format (URDF, STEP, CAD)

moment_of_inertia.description: Moment of inertia at wrist flange

navigation_list.description: All navigation systems (SLAM, GPS, VSLAM, LiDAR, wire-guided)

path_planning.description: Path planning algorithm (A*, RRT, potential fields)

powersource.description: Primary power type (AC Mains, Battery, Pneumatic, Solar)

power_consumption_normaluse_w.description: Typical power consumption during normal use

battery_life_hours.description: Runtime on full charge under normal use

cycle_time_typical.description: Typical time to complete one operational cycle

operating_altitude_max.description: Maximum operating altitude above sea level

ip_rating.description: Ingress Protection rating (e.g., IP54, IP67, IP69K)

ip_rating_text.description: IP rating description and what it means

washdown_capability.description: Can be cleaned with pressurized water

safety_feat_list.description: Safety features (E-stop, PFL, collision detection, safe zones)

safety_compliance_list.description: Compliance certification and standards (CE, FDA, ISO, HACCP, ATEX, MIL-STD)

safety_category.description: Safety category classification (PLd, PLe, SIL2, SIL3)

ethernet_ports.description: Number and type of Ethernet ports

usb_ports.description: Number and type of USB ports

control_interface_list.description: All control interfaces (teach pendant, mobile app, web, API)

cloud_connectivity.description: Cloud platform (AWS IoT, Azure IoT, proprietary)

smart_home_list.description: Smart home integrations (Alexa, Google, HomeKit, IFTTT)

control_programming_list.description: Programming methods (Python, C++, Blockly, teach mode)

collaboration.description: Collaborative mode (Power/Force Limited, Hand Guiding, etc.)

interaction.description: Required human interaction time per day

tech_sdk.description: SDK availability (Open Source, Free, Paid, Limited)

ros_package_list.description: ROS/ROS2 packages and compatibility (MoveIt, Nav2, Gazebo)

sensor_list.description: All sensor types (camera, LiDAR, IMU, ultrasonic, force/torque)

vision_system_list.description: Vision capabilities (face detection, object recognition, SLAM)

autonomy.description: Autonomy level L0â€“L5 (see codes in Section 1)

ai_capabilities_list.description: AI features (computer vision, ML, NLP, SLAM, path optimization)

machine_learning_enabled.description: Uses machine learning on-device or in-cloud

learning_curve.description: Time to learn operation (<1hr, 1 day, 1â€“2 weeks, etc.)

skill_level_required.description: Required operator skill (None, Basic, Expert, Certified)

processor_list.description: Processor types (Intel, ARM, NVIDIA Jetson, FPGA)

actuator_type_list.description: Actuator types (servo, stepper, linear, pneumatic, hydraulic)

end_effector_type.description: Tool/end effector type (welding torch, spray gun)

interoperability.description: Interoperability with other systems and robots

installation_type_list.description: Mounting/installation methods (floor, ceiling, wall, cart, rail)

setup_time.description: Time to set up (<30min, 2hrs, 1â€“3 days, Professional)

lead_time.description: Delivery lead time (In Stock to >12 months)

spare_parts_avail.description: Spare parts availability (Readily Available, OEM Only, Limited)

demo_avail_list.description: Demo options (showroom, video, free trial, rental)

manual_avail.description: User manual availability (Free Download, Registration, Physical)

user_demographic_list.description: Target users (Enterprise, SMB, Home, Research, Education)

research_papers_count.description: Number of academic papers citing this robot

patent_technologies.description: Patented technologies used in this robot
